rationale: The proposed homestead exemption increase under Tax Code §11.13(b) has no operative relationship to Educ. Code §29.929, which governs COVID-19 educational support programs funded by federal appropriations. No conflict exists.
quote: Sec. 29.929. PROGRAMS TO ENSURE ONE-TIME INTENSIVE EDUCATIONAL SUPPORTS FOR OVERCOMING COVID-19 PANDEMIC IMPACT.
_note: No conflict identified. The rule text concerns COVID-19 educational support programs and does not reference homestead exemptions or property tax appraisals.
